content.en:
After entering the assessment space, Ye Tian found that the figure of Longhai Zhenjun was gone, although he could still vaguely sense the existence of Longhai Zhenjun, but he could not contact, observe, or touch, as if the two were in different dimensions.

Ye Tian didn't care about this, but focused on a broken version of the body refining secret technique that the broken stone tablet transmitted to him.

"Hey, this mutilated version of the body refining secret technique is not simple!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This incomplete version of the body refining secret technique is the Giant Stone True Body Technique, which is not of high grade, far inferior to his own Xuan Xuan Technique, but the Giant Stone True Body Technique seems to be another system of Chaos Alchemy, and it is not the same type as many of the alchemy techniques he knows.

Moreover, it is difficult to record the true body technique of the boulder with memory, and if it cannot be practiced, it cannot be passed down at all, or even recorded.

Obviously, the Giant Stone True Body Technique involved a little shadow of some kind of forbidden alchemy, and thus possessed this characteristic.

"If you have perfected the Giant Stone True Body Technique and truly practiced it, you will truly be considered to have this alchemy technique, otherwise it will soon be forgotten and will not even be able to pass it on to others. In addition, even if you have practiced the Giant Stone True Body Technique, you can only modify it before you can pass it on to others in the form of consciousness inheritance, but you must pay a certain price. Basically, this Chaos Alchemy can only be used by oneself. Or maybe you can make that kind of stone tablet so that it can be passed on!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Transcendent talent, open!"

Ye Tian opened the transcendent comprehension talent, and his comprehension increased to a terrifying level, and then began to comprehend the true body of the giant stone.

As long as you comprehend and understand the true body of the boulder, you will know how to perfect this incomplete version of the Chaos Alchemy Technique.

Moreover, if you obtain a Chaos Alchemy Technique, if you modify it in the future, you may be able to create a Chaos Alchemy Technique that is suitable for the continuous inheritance of the Terran Race, which has unimaginable benefits for the development of the Terran Race.

At present, the Chaos Body Alchemy Technique cultivated by the human race is still relatively ordinary, and Ye Tian can't pass on the Xuanxuan Technique, otherwise he will violate the rules of the Void Heaven lineage.

This time, he had the hope of obtaining a large number of Chaos Alchemy, and none of them were ordinary Chaos Alchemy.

Time passed little by little, except for a few True Monarchs such as Ye Tian, the other True Monarchs gave up perfecting the Chaos Alchemy Technique and left one by one.

After all, for many True Monarchs, perfecting the Chaos Alchemy Technique was too wasteful of time, and there were no good rewards, so it was better to go elsewhere, and maybe they could have amazing gains.

Ye Tian also wanted to go to other places, but he was not short of resources at the moment, and this broken stone tablet inheritance was useful to him, but it took a long time.

But if you waste a lot of time getting an amazing legacy, that's pretty good.

Ye Tian was very confident in himself, he felt that the Broken Stone Tablet must have a Chaos Alchemy Technique that was comparable to or even surpassed the Xuanxuan Technique.

Although the strength of the Heavenly Ape Sect is far inferior to that of the Void Heaven First Line, and even the Dao Ancestor is not, the Heavenly Ape Sect is one of the sects of the Domain Realm after all, and it has more or less the inheritance of the Domain Realm, and it will inevitably surpass the Void Heaven First Pulse in some aspects.

The inheritance of a force must not only look at the strength of a force, but also the environment in which it is located.

The True Ancestors had been observing the ruins, but their power was limited, and they could only look at the general structure, and here in the ruined stone tablet, they could not observe it.

Even those Dao Ancestors, when their consciousness incarnations came, they only roughly observed the situation of the Heavenly Ape Sect, and after knowing that the Heavenly Ape Sect was only a True Ancestor force, they didn't have much interest.

If they understand it carefully, they will definitely gain something.

As time passed, the buildings of the ruins were breached by the True Monarchs, and some lucky people even obtained a True Monarch puppet that had not recognized the owner, and the value of this thing was even higher than that of a top-notch half-dao weapon, and if you sold it to those True Ancestors, you could definitely make a lot of money.

There are also some inheritances that have been obtained, but they are basically not very precious True Monarch inheritances.

Decades later, the entire land of ruins has been largely scouted by the True Monarchs.

Among them, there are six of the most precious places.

One is the Tibetan Scripture Pavilion, which contains many precious classics, but half of the Tibetan Scripture Pavilion has been destroyed, and the highest level of the Zangjing Pavilion has been destroyed, so the top classics are gone, and only some classics containing the knowledge of the Heavenly Monarch, the True Monarch and a small number of True Ancestors have been preserved.

However, some of the formations of the Hidden Scripture Pavilion are still preserved, and the power of these formations is not very strong, but if you want to obtain the classics, you can only browse them one by one, so it is very time-consuming.

The second place is the Time True Tower, which is relatively well preserved and can be entered by everyone to cultivate.

Entering the Time True Tower can consume energy to open the Time Formation, and the maximum is even 10,000 times the time acceleration, and if you cultivate here, you can accelerate your cultivation.

Ten thousand times the time acceleration is very extraordinary, even Ye Tian is difficult to achieve ten thousand times the time acceleration, and if he keeps the time acceleration, his own divine power consumption is too fast, and it is difficult to concentrate on cultivation.

But if you cultivate in the Time True Tower, you don't need to worry about this, you only need to store a large amount of resource energy in the time formation energy center, and you can urge the time formation without worrying about it.

When the Time True Pagoda was exposed, many True Monarchs entered it to cultivate, which could save a lot of time and grow up at the fastest speed.

The third place is the broken stone stele, which is where Ye Tian is now, but there are very few true monarchs who want to enter here.

The fourth place is the forest of heaven and earth, it is a stone forest, which contains endless natural formations, and they are all brand new formation systems, for those true monarchs who are proficient in formations, this is undoubtedly the most precious treasure land, and many true monarchs are cultivating and comprehending formations in the forest of heaven and earth.

The fifth place is the True Transmission Disciple Trial Space, but this Trial Space is much broken, and many levels have disappeared, this place is not of great help to the True Monarchs, but it is the only place to obtain the True Transmission Disciple Order.

At first, this treasure land was not attractive, but a True Monarch Bang True Monarch obtained a True Transmission Disciple Order from it, and thus entered the sixth treasure land, which was the True Transmission Hall.

When this news came out, the True Transmission Disciple Trial Space attracted a large number of True Monarchs, but it was a pity that it was very difficult to obtain the True Transmission Disciple Order.

But everyone wants to enter the True Transmission Hall, because this is the only building that has not been breached, and even if the formation is broken, its power is not something that the True Monarch can break.

Moreover, the True Monarch List True Monarch who came out of the True Inheritance Hall obtained a complete True Inheritance Inheritance from it, which was a powerful inheritance that could be cultivated directly to the extreme of the True Ancestor.

The value of such an inheritance is very high, not even less than an ordinary Dao weapon!

Who can ignore such a legacy?

And none of this has anything to do with Ye Tian, he has been destroying the stone tablet assessment space, and he has completed the assessment task of perfecting the true body of the giant stone in the first layer of the assessment space.
